'''Briike''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] soldier under [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] leadership.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], he was present in a meeting between [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and other Mandalorians in [[Zerria's Bar]] on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]].

==Behind the scenes==
His surname derives from the [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] word "''briik''" that means "line".

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}
